user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the Feedback / Grievance module, so that the feature is only active when the organization chooses to use it
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the Feedback / Grievance Module?"; Then my choice determines whether the module is active

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my module enablement selection, so that the configuration persists
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen Yes or No; When I click Save; Then the setting is stored and confirmed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to use Save & Next to continue configuration, so that I can proceed to the Feedback / Grievance Receivers setup
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the module enablement; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I advance to the next configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes, so that I can discard edits I did not intend to keep
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
